title: Lastrea hopeana
taxonomy: Lastrea hopeana is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the wood fern family. This genus is a part of the larger division of Polypodiophyta, which includes all ferns. The classification of Lastrea hopeana can be further broken down into its kingdom, Plantae, and its phylum, Pteridophyta. Within the kingdom Plantae, Lastrea hopeana belongs to the class Polypodiopsida, which includes all ferns and their allies. The specific classification of Lastrea hopeana is a key part of its identification and helps scientists understand its relationships to other plants.
